<?php namespace Hamcrest\Core; /* Copyright (c) 2009 hamcrest.org */ use Hamcrest\BaseMatcher; use Hamcrest\Description; use Hamcrest\Util; abstract class ShortcutCombination extends BaseMatcher { /** * @var array<\Hamcrest\Matcher> */ private $_matchers; public function __construct(array $matchers) { Util::checkAllAreMatchers($matchers); $this->_matchers = $matchers; } protected function matchesWithShortcut($item, $shortcut) { /** @var $matcher \Hamcrest\Matcher */ foreach ($this->_matchers as $matcher) { if ($matcher->matches($item) == $shortcut) { return $shortcut; } } return !$shortcut; } public function describeToWithOperator(Description $description, $operator) { $description->appendList('(', ' ' . $operator . ' ', ')', $this->_matchers); } }
